center.name: 馬尼拉大都會
center.summary: 馬尼拉大都會是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Ashy-breasted flycatcher，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: In January 2026, it was found in La Mesa Ecopark in Metro Manila

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: In January 2026, it was found in La Mesa Ecopark in Metro Manila
